Name: Account Management & Data Quality
Business Description: Automates account data cleansing, tracks interaction counts, manages health maintenance checks, updates revalidation dates, and maintains accurate year-to-date spending and event expenses for healthcare organizations and professionals.

Name: Territory & Alignment Management
Business Description: Manages territory alignments for accounts and internal team members, handles future territory assignments, and automates MSL self-alignments to ensure accurate territory-based access and reporting.

Name: Account Planning & Tactics
Business Description: Facilitates strategic account planning by automating owner assignments, aligning users, generating external IDs, and managing the lifecycle, status, and business impact of account tactics and opportunities.

Name: Interaction & Call Management
Business Description: Streamlines the capture of customer interactions by automatically stamping field force and rep details, generating external IDs, and providing embedded call report interfaces.

Name: Sales Referral Management
Business Description: Automates the end-to-end sales referral process, including aligning sales reps, assigning managers, generating external IDs, tracking completion dates, and creating associated follow-up tasks.

Name: Coaching & Action Items
Business Description: Supports field force development by automating the creation, sharing, and status tracking of coaching reports, as well as managing the lifecycle, notifications, and auto-closure of associated action items.

Name: Surveys & Feedback Management
Business Description: Manages the distribution and tracking of surveys, including NPS and customer satisfaction, automates reminder emails, and maintains survey target data and external IDs.

Name: Alerts & Notifications
Business Description: Generates automated alerts and user action records for specific business events, such as new ISR support requests, ensuring timely follow-up by the appropriate personnel.

Name: Medical Events & Consent Management
Business Description: Automates the rollup of year-to-date medical event expenses for attendees and manages multichannel consent by creating global opt-out records across associated accounts.

Name: MyInsights & Analytics
Business Description: Provides comprehensive data visualization and analytics through MyInsights dashboards for HCPs, HCOs, territory performance, and sales leaders, while managing associated debug logs.

Name: User & System Administration
Business Description: Handles administrative tasks such as managing Pitcher application access, updating user role descriptions, and sending email confirmation links to standard users.

Name: Medical Inquiry Management
Business Description: Manages the end-to-end lifecycle of medical inquiries, including request routing, MSL assignment tracking, status updates, and record classification to ensure timely and accurate responses to healthcare professionals.

Name: Call Reporting & Interactions
Business Description: Facilitates the logging and tracking of interactions with healthcare professionals and accounts, providing streamlined interfaces for capturing call reports and viewing interaction histories.

Name: Surveys & Feedback Management
Business Description: Enables the collection and analysis of customer feedback through standardized surveys, such as Net Promoter Score (NPS) and Customer Satisfaction (CSAT), to measure and improve service quality.

Name: Project Management
Business Description: Streamlines project tracking and execution by automatically categorizing project types and ensuring project milestones and statuses are accurately maintained for reporting and operational efficiency.

Name: User & System Administration
Business Description: Automates routine administrative tasks, such as maintaining accurate user role descriptions and managing user email verification processes, ensuring system security and data integrity.

Name: Account Planning & Tactics
Business Description: Supports strategic account management by ensuring account plans are properly assigned and managed, facilitating coordinated efforts across teams for key accounts.

Name: MyInsights & Analytics
Business Description: Provides comprehensive data visualization and reporting capabilities, offering actionable insights into territory performance, healthcare provider engagement, sales trends, and account strategies through tailored dashboards.
